setup.title: MetService Weather
setup.description: Configure your MetService NZ weather integration.

data.name: Integration name
data.use_mobile: Override public web data with mobile API (default: false)

data_description.tide_region: Select a marine region to get local tide times. Choose "None — skip" if you don't need tides.
data_description.boating_region: Select a marine region to get boating and surf conditions. Choose "None — skip" if you don't need this.
data_description.use_mobile: Only useful if your location is not in the list above, or if you want weather data to follow your current GPS position rather than a fixed location. Requires a private API key extracted from the MetService mobile app — see the README for instructions.
data_description.mobile_api_key: Required only when the mobile API override above is enabled. See the README for how to obtain this key.

locations.title: Marine locations
locations.description: Choose the specific station for each marine feature you enabled.

error.api_key_required: A mobile API key is required when using the mobile API override.
error.tide_location_not_found: Could not determine the URL for the selected tide station.
error.boating_location_not_found: Could not determine the URL for the selected boating location.
